title: BNI-SICO-AED - Bank Statement.pdf
notes: Hybrid mode requested through opendataloader_pdf.convert(..., hybrid='docling-fast'). Forced OCR must be enabled on the hybrid server process itself.
Hybrid selected because: image-only output, document looks image-only
Local OCR fallback used RapidOCR on page 1.
Rendered scanned PDF page images at high resolution and extracted OCR words with coordinates.
Reconstructed statement table from OCR lines after rejecting malformed OCR geometry output.
